    Class
    Description
    class 
    VacmMIB
    This concrete implementation of the SNMP-VIEW-BASED-ACM-MIB (RFC 3415).

    VacmConfigurator.VacmConfigResult
    VacmConfigurator.removeRole(MutableVACM vacm, String role)

    VacmConfigurator.VacmConfigResult
    BasicVacmConfigurator.removeUser(MutableVACM vacm, org.snmp4j.smi.OctetString securityName, String role)

    VacmConfigurator.removeUser(MutableVACM vacm, org.snmp4j.smi.OctetString securityName, String role)
